svg.text: Bare-metal Rust + Metal GPU inference on Apple Silicon
⚡ Executor Forward Pass — Decode Pipeline (per token)
🔧 Metal GPU Kernels (9 shader files · 50+ kernel functions)
CPU ↔ GPU share the same physical memory — no PCIe copies
StorageModeShared · mmap zero-copy · 273 GB/s bandwidth (M4 Pro)
